news.headline: The global custom keychain market is experiencing unprecedented growth in 2026, transforming from simple accessories into fashion-forward personalized gifts
Small objects are trending - Custom pins, patches, and keychains seeing rising spring-season demand, with graduation season driving significant growth

Anime merchandise market continues explosive growth with IP collaborations driving new demand patterns
Print on demand technology advances enable faster turnaround and higher quality for custom merchandise

market_trends.name: 个性化定制热潮
market_trends.description: 消费者对个性化定制产品需求持续上升，钥匙扣、徽章等小件定制成为主流

market_trends.name: IP联名效应
market_trends.description: 动漫、游戏IP联名产品销量显著增长，Palworld等新兴IP带动周边市场

market_trends.name: DTC品牌崛起
market_trends.description: Direct-to-Consumer品牌模式在定制周边领域快速发展，独立站成为主要销售渠道

market_trends.name: 可持续生产
market_trends.description: 环保材料和可持续生产流程受到越来越多消费者关注
